caption: A man with gray hair and glasses, wearing a dark jacket over a white collared shirt, is seated at a desk in an office setting. He is seen in profile, facing right. In the background, another person in a dark suit is partially visible, and a red bag with a cartoon character is resting on a shelf. On the desk are a silver thermos, a blue tissue box, and a tablet. A banner across the bottom of the scene displays the logo "ORCA" and the text "April 12, 2019 House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, and the camera angle stays constant. By the final frames, he begins to gesture with his right hand, raising it toward the person off-screen to his right as he speaks.
